props.cols: Column span for the base (xs-and-up) breakpoint: 1–12, `"auto"` to fit content, or `"n/total"` for a custom total. Falsy = equal-width fill.
props.sm: Span from the sm breakpoint up.
props.md: Span from the md breakpoint up.
props.lg: Span from the lg breakpoint up.
props.xl: Span from the xl breakpoint up.
props.xxl: Span from the xxl breakpoint up.
props.offset: Columns to push the column right by, from the left edge.
props.offsetSm: offset from the sm breakpoint up.
props.offsetMd: offset from the md breakpoint up.
props.offsetLg: offset from the lg breakpoint up.
props.offsetXl: offset from the xl breakpoint up.
props.offsetXxl: offset from the xxl breakpoint up.
props.orderSm: order from the sm breakpoint up.
props.orderMd: order from the md breakpoint up.
props.orderLg: order from the lg breakpoint up.
props.orderXl: order from the xl breakpoint up.
props.orderXxl: order from the xxl breakpoint up.
props.alignSelf: Cross-axis self alignment (align-self): auto, start, end, center, baseline, stretch.
props.tag: The element the column renders as.
